data.title: AI tools Grok and ChatGPT revolutionize crypto day trading, identifying sentiment changes swiftly for trading strategies.
data.description: Artificial intelligence technologies such as Grok and ChatGPT have revolutionized the way traders engage in crypto day trading. These tools analyze sentiment shifts in real time and convert them into organized trade strategies, making the process more efficient and data-driven for traders. This advanced technology is enabling traders to make well-informed decisions quickly, potentially resulting in higher profits and reduced risks associated with cryptocurrency trading.

data.title: PepsiCo's $2 billion healthy snacks portfolio shines, with focus on natural ingredients & no artificial additives. No-sugar drinks thrive ahead of protein beverage launch, Lay's & Tostitos to relaunch with cleaner options. Energy drink segment tops.
data.description: PepsiCo Inc. reported strong second-quarter earnings, focusing on a $2 billion permissible snack portfolio encompassing brands like SunChips and Simply, capitalizing on consumer preferences for natural ingredients. Chairman and CEO Ramon Laguarta highlighted their leadership in healthier snacking, with plans to relaunch Lay's and Tostitos by next fiscal year by removing artificial additives. PepsiCo is also expanding its no-sugar and energy drink segments, with success in no-sugar colas and growth in Gatorade and Propel in hydration. The energy drink category, bolstered by partnerships like Celsius and Starbucks, is an area of continued investment. The company is taking proactive steps to cater to evolving consumer demands.

data.title: Fed Governor Waller calls for 25 BPS cut in July due to sluggish economy; GDP growth at 1%. Trump pressures Powell.
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller recently advocated for a 25 basis points cut in interest rates at the Federal Open Market Committee's July meeting. In a speech at New York University's Money Marketeers, Waller justified his position by citing recent economic data, stating that real GDP growth was likely around 1% in the first half of the year and is anticipated to remain soft throughout 2025. He also mentioned that consumer spending is projected to continue growing at a similar rate but may be dampened by a slowdown in real disposable income growth. Waller's remarks come amidst concerns about the labor market trends and their impact.

data.title: Microsoft is using innovative UX design to fight cybercrime, making products more secure against online scams.
data.description: To address the increasing threat of online scams and cybercrime, Microsoft is incorporating advanced UX design strategies to enhance security within its products. By integrating security measures directly into the development process, Microsoft aims to provide users with safer online experiences. This proactive approach reflects the company’s commitment to combating cyber threats and ensuring the protection of its users.

data.title: INVL Technology ended agreement with Corum Zurich branch for divesting portfolio companies, with some terms valid for 12 months.
data.description: INVL Technology recently announced the termination of its agreement with a company of the Corum group, specifically the Zurich branch of Luxembourg-based Corum Group International S.à.r.l. The agreement, which was terminated on July 17, 2025, was formed to assist INVL Technology in divesting its portfolio companies before the end of the investment period. Following the termination, certain terms will continue to be in effect for a 12-month tail period.

data.title: Deepest marathon in Garpenberg mine organized by Boliden, ICMM, and BecomingX on Oct 25 will be 1,120 meters underground.
data.description: In Stockholm on July 18, 2025, it was announced that Boliden, ICMM, and BecomingX are collaborating to host the deepest marathon in the world on October 25. The event will take place in the Garpenberg zinc mine and will cover a distance of 1,120 meters underground. This unique marathon will attract participants and spectators globally, showcasing the mining industry and promoting physical fitness in an unconventional setting.
